## Task

Create register functionality. See `frontend/plan/32-FRONTEND-AGENT-PROMPTS.md` `#F04` for detailed instructions.

### Files:
1. **`Models/Auth/RegisterViewModel.cs`** — Name, Email, Password, ConfirmPassword, Role (dropdown: Customer/Developer)
2. **`Models/Auth/RegisterApiResponse.cs`** — matches backend response
3. **`Views/Auth/Register.cshtml`** — Bootstrap 5 form with role selection dropdown
4. **`AuthController` additions** — GET/POST Register actions

### Logic:
- POST → call AuthService.RegisterAsync()
- On success → redirect to login with "Registration successful" message
- On failure → show validation errors from backend

Verify build. PR description must link back to this issue using GitHub closing keywords.
